items.title: What we know about the Golders Green stabbings
items.raw_content: Two Jewish men have been stabbed in Golders Green, north London, an attack police have declared a terrorist incident.
items.ai_summary: 伦敦Golders Green两名犹太男子被刺伤，警方宣布为恐怖事件。

items.title: Police declare terrorist incident after two Jewish men stabbed in London
items.raw_content: A 45-year-old man has been arrested on suspicion of attempted murder, the Met Police says.
items.ai_summary: 伦敦两名犹太男子被刺伤，警方宣布为恐怖事件，一名45岁男子因涉嫌谋杀未遂被捕。

items.title: 'Attacked 28 times in a day' - BBC visits heavily targeted US-UK base in Iraq
items.raw_content: Before the fragile ceasefire in the region, this was one of the most heavily targeted US and UK military bases in the Middle East.
items.ai_summary: BBC探访伊拉克受严重攻击的美英基地，在停火前曾一天遭28次袭击。

items.title: Meta shares slide as investors weigh Big Tech's AI spending spree
items.raw_content: Meta, Amazon, Alphabet and Microsoft all reported earnings at the same time on Wednesday.
items.ai_summary: Meta、亚马逊、Alphabet和微软同日发布财报，投资者评估大型科技公司的人工智能支出浪潮，Meta股价下滑。

items.title: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel
items.raw_content: The governor of Sinaloa, Rúben Rocha Moya, hails from the same party as the president of Mexico.
items.ai_summary: 美国指控墨西哥锡那罗亚州州长Rúben Rocha Moya协助贩毒集团。

items.title: Women can wait years for an endometriosis diagnosis. New tech could change that
items.raw_content: A new scan technique could spot areas of endometriosis missed by conventional scans, scientists say.
items.ai_summary: 新技术扫描可发现传统扫描遗漏的子宫内膜异位症区域，有望缩短女性确诊等待时间。

items.title: Christchurch mass killer loses bid to overturn conviction
items.raw_content: White supremacist Brenton Tarrant's appeal is "utterly devoid of merit", a New Zealand court has ruled.
items.ai_summary: 新西兰法院驳回基督城枪击案凶手Brenton Tarrant的上诉，认为其毫无根据。

items.title: 'King Charles is coming to Harlem': What the royals did in the Big Apple
items.raw_content: After visiting the 9/11 Memorial, Queen Camilla read to children at the New York Public Library and King Charles visited a community organisation in Harlem.
items.ai_summary: 查尔斯国王和卡米拉王后在纽约访问9/11纪念馆、公共图书馆和哈莱姆社区组织。

items.title: US singer D4vd bought tools online to dispose of girl's body, prosecutors allege
items.raw_content: The Tiktok star's attorneys have maintained his innocence and vowed to "vigorously defend" him.
items.ai_summary: 美国TikTok明星D4vd被指控在线购买工具处理女孩尸体，律师称将坚决辩护。

items.title: Bondi shooting inquiry calls for gun reform and more security at Jewish festivals
items.raw_content: An interim report says country should prioritise 'nationally consistent' firearms reforms.
items.ai_summary: Bondi枪击案中期报告建议全国一致的枪支改革和加强犹太节日安保。
